steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The underlined sentence begins with “This evidence is exciting because”—it explicitly labels the findings as significant AND provides a reason. This dual structure is the decisive clue about the sentence's function.

steps.title: Match the function to the choices
steps.content:
C directly matches: the sentence explains why the team's finding matters (the synganglion discovery helps us understand arthropod relationships).

A contradicts the passage's positive framing of the evidence.

B mistakes this for a definition when synganglion was already defined earlier.

D misreads the passage—both cave crickets and krill are presented as arthropods.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
